meta_description: Learn about the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200 and compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding.
body_html:
Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200, with $100,000 in equity-free funding at stake.

11:59 p.m. PT: Application window closes 12:00 a.m. PT: Nomination window closes

$100,000 Global visibility, investor access, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage

Eligibility and Application Process

Startups must be founded after January 1, 2023 Applications must include a detailed business plan, pitch deck, and team information

source.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
source.summary: The application window for Startup Battlefield 200 is closing today at 11:59 p.m. PT. The competition offers $100,000 in equity-free funding, global visibility, direct connections with investors, and a spot on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage. Founders or startups can still nominate themselves or submit their applications before the deadline expires.
